title: The Grip of the Yukon
writer: Charles Logue, William MacLeod Raine, Tom Reed
actors: Francis X. Bushman, Neil Hamilton, June Marlowe
plot: An old-time Alaskan miner dies and leaves his fortune and holdings to his daughter in the states. She comes north and is befriended by two old friends of her father. And she needs all the befriending they can provide as a true-blu...
